- At only 2 files the zone was isolated primarily on negative evidence (absence of cross-zone imports) rather than strong internal graph density; assess whether it warrants its own zone boundary or should be absorbed into a broader web tooling group.

- web-landing-page is the only zone in the entire web package with zero coupling in both directions; this is the only web zone that could be extracted into a standalone deployment artifact or CDN page without touching any other zone's imports.
- Zero inbound and outbound coupling makes web-landing-page the only web zone with no dependency obligations — it is an ideal candidate for independent deployment or replacement without any refactoring of adjacent zones.
- web-landing-page (landing.ts + landing.test.ts) covers only 2 of the 3 files in src/landing/ — index.html is zoned into web-application-core.
